fields.helpText: This is the route of administration for pharmaceuticals or radiopharmaceuticals administered during an imaging procedure.
Bodily sites of drug administration appropriate for this route of administration should be entered here.  During case edit, users will be restricted to selecting only the sites entered here.

This field should be answered 'Yes' only if selection of this route of administration should trigger a prompt asking for a "free text" site of administration rather than restricting users to selecting a site entered as a valid site of administration for this route.  An example might be a route of administration where there are so many possible sites of administration that it is impractical to associate them all with the route.
